data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for approval deadlines and escalation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding approval deadlines and escalation. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate how approval deadlines are enforced or how escalations are handled in the workflow. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off process but lacks concrete details on the specific mechanisms for deadlines and escalation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of how approval deadlines are enforced or how escalations are managed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify approval deadlines and escalation mechanisms.
